claim: USS Tripoli (LHA-7) and 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit entered CENTCOM area on March 27, 2026, with approximately 3,500 sailors and Marines.
Approximately 2,500 Marines deployed via USS Boxer (LHD-4) and warships between March 20-24, 2026, signaling potential ground options in the Middle East.
Pentagon plans deployment of 3,000-4,000 soldiers from the 82nd Airborne Division for regional buildup in the Middle East.
US military strikes have targeted 9,000 Iranian targets, with 13 US troops killed and 290 wounded since the start of the US-Iran war on February 28, 2026.
Joint US-Israeli strikes on Iran began on February 28, 2026, targeting Iranian nuclear, military, and industrial sites including locations in Tehran.
Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei was killed, with power shifting to IRGC hardliners and new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei assuming leadership as of March 12, 2026.
Mohammad Bagher Zolghadr was appointed as Supreme National Security Council Secretary, enhancing military-security dominance over civilian institutions.
A nationwide internet blackout in Iran was implemented to tighten regime control as of March 28, 2026.
Iran presented a ceasefire proposal on March 25, 2026, demanding an end to strikes, reparations, and control of the Strait of Hormuz.
The United States presented ceasefire terms on March 25, 2026, including sanctions relief, Iranian nuclear rollback, and IAEA monitoring.
President Trump declared the US-Iran war 'won' on March 24, 2026, but stated the US insists on Iranian concessions.
Thailand secured safe passage for its oil vessels through the Strait of Hormuz on March 28, 2026.
Oil prices remained elevated due to Strait of Hormuz disruptions and proxy threats as of late March 2026.
Iran continues missile and drone attacks on Israel and US positions amid the ongoing war that began February 28, 2026.
A jailbreak at Mariwan detention facility occurred in early March 2026 amid ongoing strikes on detention facilities.
Iran's nuclear restart and missile development programs are cited as context for US military buildup as of March 2026.
US military operations expanded to include combat against Iranian missile and drone threats using A-10s and Apache helicopters.
Iran retains leverage via Strait of Hormuz control despite experiencing naval degradation as of late March 2026.
Iran accused the United States of 'negotiating with itself' in ceasefire discussions as of late March 2026.
Trump threatened escalation in the US-Iran conflict if no deal is reached, as of late March 2026.
